content.claim: Church takeover of village schools is an established alternative-operator coalition for keeping schools nominally open; expansion of denominational sector grew 60% (2001-2011) and a further 47% (2011-2014) in small towns and villages.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Political feasibility lens
limitations: Growth figures capture enrollment, not causal effect of takeover on retention of marginalized students
Does not isolate whether takeovers genuinely prevented closures or merely transferred already-operating schools
France24 commentary on selective enrollment by wealth/ethnicity is anecdotal, not systematically audited
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
